slides.content: Bandanas to wear or to hang at home (2025). The design is inspired by the summers I spent haying at my grandparents. Every bandana has been manually screen printed in Switzerland by @sami_and_co_ch. Prints may contain imperfections and, therefore, have slight differences. That's part of the process and beauty of working by hand. *54x54 cm *97% polyester, 3% cotton *Khaki with black ink / Khaki with off-white ink *SOLD OUT

'J.C on Viagra' (2025) A tribute to one of the best frontman ever: Sebastian Murphy from the band Viagra Boys. I painted it for the collective exhibition celebrating the 20th birthday of les Docks in Lausanne. The painting reinterprets Murphy's tattoos and blends some visuals from the band's albums. *On the chair : original painting, 50x40cm, acrylic on cardboard *On the wall: high quality print, A2, on fine art paper 300 g/m2, serie of 11 signed For all inquiries: workwithjolan@outlook.com
